title: United India Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: United India Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, United India Insurance in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About United India Insurance:
United India Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance!
